transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I want to push my appointment. Got stuck with something at home, can't make it tomorrow.
AGENT: No problem at all. Could I have your name and the appointment details?
CALLER: Omkar Kulkarni. It was tomorrow at 11 AM with the GP.
AGENT: Yes, I see it — Omkar Kulkarni, 11 AM tomorrow with Dr. Ramesh Iyer. When would you like to reschedule?
CALLER: Uh, can I do this Friday? Any time in the afternoon?
AGENT: Friday afternoon has 2 PM and 4:30 PM available with Dr. Iyer. Which do you prefer?
CALLER: 4:30 PM is better.
AGENT: Done! Rescheduled to Friday at 4:30 PM. You'll get an updated SMS. Anything else?
CALLER: Nope, that's it. Cheers.
